titleStmt.title: SII 27.15: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 15. (A.R. No. 204 of 1941-42.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Right side of entrance into the Nāḻikēttāṉ-gōpura of Raṅganāthasvāmin temple.

This fragmentary record refers to the donation made for burning two lamps in the temple at Śrīraṅga-kshētra by a person (name lost) who is described as Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi and Daṇḍanāyaka of Tribhuvanamalla-bhaṭṭāra of the Chālukya family, obviously, Vikramāditya VI. The record also refers to the application of lime mortar to the shrine of Sēnāpati i.e., Vishvaksēna, probably by the same donor.
It is dated the 29th year of Kulōttuṅga-mahādēva (i.e. Kulottuṅga Chōḷa I) corresponding to 1098-90 A.D.
This record is published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XXXVI, pp. 253 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The beginning of all the lines are lost. Since there is unengraved end of each line, it appears that the original stone was broken and the fragments were built into the wall.
div.p:
bhamahārājādhi rāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kōḷa tiḷakaṁ
bhuvanamalla bhaṭṭāraṟa kannaḍa santhi vigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ
kulōttuṁga mahādēvarggiyaṇḍu Ippattoṁbhattāgalu
śrīraṁga kṣētradēvara veḷakeraḍakkaṁ koṭṭa
ya kōn Aḷagiya manavāḷa kōn . tiru
karuṇāgarakōn . śrī Aḷa seṁgakōn . tirumāri jīluThis may be a mistake fortirumāliruṁjōlai.
Aṁteṁtu mānasada va sadaloppisida[r .] Avaru diva saṁ
ppavaṁ dēvara veḷakiṁge taṁdeṟivarā caṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi
I dharmma śrīraṁgadēvara śrī vaiṣṇava rakṣe .
va sēnāpatiya kōgileyaṁ suṇṇadasōte
dar .
Digital edition of SII 27.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
